public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk.
appearance: Status-conscious attire, controlled insignia, and the kind of detail others read before the first word make authority obvious.
manner: Measures every exchange for precedent, alignment, and the cost of appearing uncertain. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of discipline clerk in and around Giant Council, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Giant Council workable through the obligations of discipline clerk while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep status, precedent, and practical necessity from openly tearing against one another. Around Giant Council, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of discipline clerk visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Norr Forgebound needs discreet outside help to contain political strain, prestige loss, or institutional damage before it spreads through Giant Council.
Getting entangled with Norr Forgebound can pull the party into protocol, alliance pressure, or public consequence centered on Giant Council.
Norr Forgebound can trade usable insight about Giant Council if the party solves a problem that cannot be addressed openly through the office they hold.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Norr Forgebound carries civic or noble weight.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Giant Council: estates, audience spaces, council rooms, protocol-heavy gatherings, or civic seats
